privileged_info_summary: The west_facade_glare_control_blinds task operates on the synthetic 4StoreyBuilding model, a 4-floor building with 40 total spaces and 20 windows/doors. The building has 8 west-facing spaces (B.W4, B.W9, G.W14, G.W19, M.W24, M.W29, T.W34, T.W39) distributed across 4 floors. Only 3 above-ground floors (Ground, Middle, Top) have exterior windows on the west facade, totaling 5 openings: 2 windows + 1 door on Ground floor (G.W14), 1 window on Middle floor (M.W24), and 1 window on Top floor (T.W34). The task requires creating a hierarchical schedule (Glare-Day-Sch, Glare-Week-Sch, Glare-Year-Sch) with blinds closed (value 1.0) during hours 15-18 (14:00-18:00, afternoon peak glare period) and open (value 0.0) during all other hours. All 5 west-facing exterior windows must have Interior Shade Type set to VENETIAN-BLINDS with the Glare-Year-Sch assigned. The simulation is run over a full year (2013) using eQUEST 3.65 (DOE-2.2) with output saved to 4StoreyBuilding.sim.
